top_candidates.reward_code_head:
def compute_reward(obs, action, next_obs, done, info):
    components = {}
    # component: distance_reward
    component_0 = float(-0.25 * np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) + 1.0 * (np.sqrt(obs[0]**2 + obs[1]**2) - np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2)))
    component_0 = max(min(component_0, 5.0), -5.0)
    components['distance_reward'] = float(component_0)
    # component: velocity_penalty
    component_1 = float(-0.25 * np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2))
    component_1 = max(min(component_1, 0.0), -5.0)
    components['velocity_penalty'] = float(component_1)
    # component: angle_penalty
    component_2 = float(-0.5 * abs(next_obs[4]))
    component_2 = max(min(component_2, 0.0), -5.0)
    components['angle_penalty'] = float(component_2)
    # component: fuel_efficiency
    component_3 = float(0.0)
    component_3 = max(min(component_3, 0.0), 0.0)
    components['fuel_efficiency'] = float(component_3)
    # component: terminal
    component_4 = float(float(done) * (400.0 if (np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.1 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.1 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.1) else -25.0))
    component_4 = max(min(component_4, 500.0), -500.0)
    components['terminal'] = float(component_4)
    total_reward = component_0 + component_1 + component_2 + component_3 + component_4
    total_reward = max(min(total_reward, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    return float(total_reward), components
top_candidates.llm_rationale: Reduce per-step penalties to make net reward less negative and encourage exploration. Decrease distance base coefficient from -0.5 to -0.25, velocity coefficient from -0.5 to -0.25, angle coefficient from -1.0 to -0.5. Keep progress reward at 1.0. Remove survival bonus (was +0.5) to maintain low generated-private gap. Increase terminal success reward from +500 to +400, reduce crash penalty from -50 to -25. Keep fuel_efficiency at 0.0 (disabled). These changes aim to make successful landings more dominant and reduce the negative per-step accumulation that discourages learning.

    components = {}
    # component: distance_reward

    components['distance_reward'] = float(component_0)
    # component: velocity_penalty

    component_1 = max(min(component_1, 0.0), -5.0)
    components['velocity_penalty'] = float(component_1)

    component_2 = max(min(component_2, 0.0), -5.0)
    components['angle_penalty'] = float(component_2)
    # component: fuel_efficiency
    component_3 = float(0.0)
    component_3 = max(min(component_3, 0.0), 0.0)
    components['fuel_efficiency'] = float(component_3)
    # component: terminal
    component_4 = float(float(done) * (400.0 if (np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.1 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.1 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.1) else -25.0))
    component_4 = max(min(component_4, 500.0), -500.0)
    components['terminal'] = float(component_4)
    total_reward = component_0 + component_1 + component_2 + component_3 + component_4

bottom_candidates.llm_rationale: Reduce per-step penalties to make net reward less negative and encourage exploration. Decrease distance base coefficient from -0.5 to -0.25, velocity coefficient from -0.5 to -0.25, angle coefficient from -1.0 to -0.5. Keep progress reward at 1.0. Remove survival bonus (was +0.5) to maintain low generated-private gap. Increase terminal success reward from +500 to +400, reduce crash penalty from -50 to -25. Keep fuel_efficiency at 0.0 (disabled). These changes aim to make successful landings more dominant and reduce the negative per-step accumulation that discourages learning.
